name: smorch-dev
description: SMOrchestra internal development workflow plugin. 10 slash commands (plan, code, score, bridge-gaps, handover, qa-handover-score, qa-run, ship, triage, retro) + 9 skills. 5-hat scoring with internal calibration (92+ ship gate, 8.5 hat floor). MENA checks (Arabic RTL + mobile 375px), BRD traceability, elegance pause, lessons.md self-improvement, QA handover scoring, cost tracking. For dev + QA machines (Mamoun + Lana + future hires).
